##NAMES=Clinoatacamite
##RRUFFID=R090062
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Cu_2_Cl(OH)_3_
##LOCALITY=Copper Queen Mine, Bisbee, Arizona
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=William W. Pinch
##DESCRIPTION=Dark green blocky crystals associated with green acicular atacamite, blue claringbullite, R090016, and cuprite. Some crystals are tabular, and these are untwinned.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R090062
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Cu_2.01_Cl_0.98_(OH)_3_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
